title: AI Guardian - Voice-Enabled Cybersecurity Assistant
description: An AI-powered cybersecurity assistant with voice interaction to detect system vulnerabilities, provide security recommendations, and answer cyber-related queries.

title: AI Interviewer & ATS Optimizer
description: AI-based platform that generates interview questions, conducts mock interviews, and analyzes resumes for ATS compatibility.

title: Password Strength Analyzer
description: Security tool that evaluates password strength, identifies weak patterns, and estimates resistance to brute-force attacks.

title: Weather Forecasting System
description: A real-time weather application with AI voice assistance for location-based weather updates and forecasts.

title: Railway Ticket Management System
description: A database-driven application for ticket booking, seat availability checking, passenger records, and train schedule management.

title: Tic-Tac-Toe Game
description: An interactive Tic-Tac-Toe game implementing game logic, user interaction, and win/draw detection.

title: KFC Billing System
description: A billing application for order management, automatic bill generation, and receipt printing.
